tools.name: add_fact
tools.description: Add a new atomic fact to a knowledge graph entity. Use this to record new information about a person, project, or concept. Facts are stored in items.json and auto-assigned incremental IDs (e.g., safa-001). For updating existing facts, use supersede_fact instead.

tools.name: supersede_fact
tools.description: Supersede an old fact by marking it as superseded and adding a new fact. Use this when information has changed and you want to maintain history rather than deleting facts. The old fact's status changes to 'superseded' and links to the new fact via supersededBy. For adding completely new facts without superseding, use add_fact instead.

old.description: ID of the fact to supersede (e.g., 'safa-002')

tools.name: summarize_entity
tools.description: Regenerate an entity summary markdown file (summary.md) from all active facts. Use this to create or refresh a human-readable overview of an entity based on its current active facts. The summary includes the entity name, update date, and bullet points of active facts sorted by timestamp.

messages.content: Hey, I wanted to start tracking my mentee here. His name is Marcus Thompson, he's a sophomore wide receiver at State University. Pretty fast kid with good hands, really coming into his own this season. He's currently sitting at third on the depth chart but has been making plays in practice. Can you help me set up his profile with all that?
I'd be happy to help you set up Marcus Thompson's profile! Let me add all that information for you.

Hey, got an update on Marcus. He moved up to second on the depth chart after a solid performance against Central last week. Caught a 40-yard touchdown in the second quarter and has been consistently beating his defender on slant routes. The coaches are finally starting to notice what I've been seeing in practice. Can you update his profile with this?

Got it! Here's what I updated for Marcus:

**Athletic Profile**

messages.content:
Done! I've generated a summary for Marcus Thompson. It includes all 13 facts tracked so far and was last updated today (January 13, 2025).

The summary gives you a complete view of where he's at in his development:
- His role as a sophomore wide receiver at State University
- His move up to second on the depth chart
- His game performance against Central (the 40-yard TD, solid plays)
- His practice strengths (speed, good hands, beating defenders on slant routes)
- The note about coaches starting to notice

You can reference this going forward as you track his progress through the season. Let me know if you need any updates or want to add more details!

Perfect, that's exactly what I needed. The summary gives me a clear picture of where Marcus stands in his development. Thanks for putting all that together - it's helpful to have everything in one place as we continue tracking him through the season.

[TASK_END]

You're welcome! I'm glad it's helping you keep everything organized for Marcus. It's exciting to see his progress - moving up to second on the depth chart and making those plays in games is a big step.

Feel free to reach out anytime you want to update his profile or track other mentees. Good luck with the rest of the season!
